N_PLC_ECU_V2.4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7D8
Recv ID: 7C8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 97
Func Name: PLC/PLGW

Auto IDents

  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "CONTINENTAL_ENGINEERING_SERVICES                                ",
    "soft": "283G81489R                      ",
    "version": "REX10_0u0_440_000               "
  }
]
